author: Tim Pietrusky
name: Order-13 Full-Rescore N-gram + 11L Int6 GPTQ + EMA + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2
blurb: Two-pass order-13 entropy-adaptive n-gram backoff with full-rescore on 11L gated-attention + value-residual model. Int6 GPTQ (descending actorder, dead column handling) + lzma compression. EMA(0.997), warmdown 3500, matrix_lr 0.05, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, XSA-all, partial RoPE, VE(128).
